name: population_search_flow
description: Selection, mutation and restart driven population search loaded from JSON

steps.name: initialize_population
steps.message: candidate population initialized

steps.name: summarize_initial_population
steps.message: initial population summarized

steps.name: set_schedule_progress
steps.message: progress ratio updated from the current iteration

steps.name: set_phase_label
steps.message: search phase label updated from schedule progress

steps.name: set_mutation_scale
steps.message: mutation scale cooled according to the schedule

steps.name: set_directional_scale
steps.message: directional exploitation scale increased with progress

steps.name: set_annealing_temperature
steps.message: acceptance temperature cooled with the iteration schedule

steps.name: set_best_score_trend
steps.message: best score memory updated from recent summaries

steps.name: set_diversity_trend
steps.message: diversity memory updated from recent summaries

steps.name: set_selection_policy
steps.message: selection policy adapted from the current search phase

steps.name: set_acceptance_policy
steps.message: acceptance policy adapted from diversity feedback

steps.name: set_response_history
steps.message: response mode history refreshed from recent response actions

steps.name: set_selection_policy_history
steps.message: selection policy history refreshed from recent response actions

steps.name: set_acceptance_policy_history
steps.message: acceptance policy history refreshed from recent response actions

steps.name: set_restart_mode_history
steps.message: restart mode history refreshed from recent response actions

steps.name: set_phase_history
steps.message: phase history refreshed from recent iteration phases

steps.name: set_response_usage_profile
steps.message: response usage counts aggregated from recent response history

steps.name: set_selection_policy_usage_profile
steps.message: selection policy usage counts aggregated from recent policy history

steps.name: set_response_candidates
steps.message: response candidates scored from trend and history channels

steps.name: select_response_candidate
steps.message: highest scoring response candidate selected

steps.name: activate_selected_response
steps.message: selected response candidate applied

steps.name: select_population_batch
steps.message: candidates selected with tournament policy

steps.name: set_elite_population
steps.message: top candidates materialized as elites

steps.name: recombine_population
steps.message: selected candidates recombined into directional offspring

steps.name: mutate_population
steps.message: recombined offspring mutated into candidate variants

steps.name: accept_population_candidates
steps.message: annealed acceptance applied with a cooling schedule

steps.name: restart_population
steps.message: population rebuilt from elites, offspring and restart injections

steps.name: summarize_population
steps.message: population summary refreshed

steps.name: set_best_score_outcome_history
steps.message: best-score outcome deltas refreshed from recent summaries

steps.name: set_response_outcome_events
steps.message: response outcome events materialized from response history and score deltas

steps.name: set_response_effectiveness_profile
steps.message: response effectiveness profile aggregated from recent outcome events

steps.name: set_phase_response_effectiveness_profile
steps.message: phase-aware response effectiveness profile aggregated from recent outcome events
